infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: GridLock needs your location to announce blocker positions as you approach intersections.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: GridLock needs your location to announce blocker positions during your ride.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: GridLock needs background location to announce blocker positions during your ride.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow GridLock to use your location to announce blocker positions during motorcycle rides.
